items.name: openclaw/openclaw
items.description: Open-source personal AI assistant that runs on your own hardware and connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Signal, iMessage, and Microsoft Teams. The fastest-growing GitHub repository in history.

items.name: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
items.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. A pioneering autonomous AI agent framework.

items.name: n8n-io/n8n
items.description: Open-source workflow automation platform with 400+ integrations, AI-native and fully customizable with LangChain support built in.

items.name: ollama/ollama
items.description: The simplest way to run LLMs locally. One command downloads and runs any supported model including DeepSeek, GLM-5, Qwen, Gemma, Llama.

items.name: langflow-ai/langflow
items.description: Langflow is a powerful low-code tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows with drag-and-drop interface.

items.name: langgenius/dify
items.description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development. All-in-one toolchain for building, deploying, and managing AI applications.

items.name: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
items.description: Full system prompts and AI models for Augment Code, Claude Code, Cursor, Devin AI, Windsurf and other AI tools.

items.name: langchain-ai/langchain
items.description: The agent engineering platform. Foundational framework for building reliable AI agents in Python with chains, agents, memory, and retrieval.

items.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
items.description: Collection of 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run, using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and open-source models.

items.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
items.description: The agent that grows with you. Production-grade AI agent framework with terminal-first interface, multi-platform messaging gateway, and persistent memory.
